title: About
subtitle: TEAM UP FOR FAMILY GROWTH
originText: IndianBob is a family-tech app originated in Korea.
heroDesc1: We believe parenting and child development should be a team effort, not a solo journey.
heroDesc2: By understanding each child’s personality and growth data, connecting families, and leveraging AI, we support everyday parenting decisions.
bodyText: IndianBob is a family-tech app originated in Korea. We believe parenting and child development should be a team effort, not a solo journey. By understanding each child’s personality and growth data, connecting families, and leveraging AI, we support everyday parenting decisions. After analyzing parenting challenges, we provide practical guidance tailored to each family’s unique context.
